quotes.text: The best marketing doesn't feel like marketing. It feels like someone telling you about something that will genuinely help you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Influencer marketing is just paying someone to pretend they like your product. The audience knows. They just don't care.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best indie hackers are the ones who build things they personally use. They're their own best customer.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your best content is the content you'd want to read. Write for yourself first.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best personal brand is one that's authentic. Not polished. Authentic.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to stand out is to be genuinely yourself. In a world of copies, the original wins.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your leadership style should be as unique as your personality. Don't copy others' styles.
quotes.author: based
